//: Contact registry (Phase 10b, presentation_layer_narrative.md §4.2). contact_id -> display metadata for the Burner Phone's threaded messages. 'unknown' is the reserved fallback thread for events an authored batch never tags with "contact" -- always present (ContactRegistry synthesizes it even if a future edit drops this row). The other four group the ~19 shipped gritty events (Sonnet 5, 10b tagging pass): coach_reyes carries the on-field/clubhouse arc, agent_diaz carries league/legal/health correspondence, girlfriend_jess carries the romance/marriage/family arc, family_mom carries the pre-16 heir-interest beats. The syndicate/arrest arc stays on 'unknown' by design -- those events are deliberately anonymous threats, not named relationships.
